name: Dyed Fuel Tax Refund

eligibility.description: Must establish that the fuel is indelibly dyed, tax was previously paid, and the fuel is exempt from taxation under section 4082(a).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a person who removes eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene from a terminal to receive a payment equal to the excise tax previously paid under section 4081.
